programmes.show_description: From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
Remember when rock was WILD? From '64 to '74 the pioneering heroes presented by a man who was at the centre of it all - from The Kinks to The Beatles to Black Sabbath to Queen!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
An hour of Nu Metal from the likes of Alien Ant Farm, Evanescence and Limp Bizkit to Korn, Linkin Park and Rage Against The Machine.
Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands and artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.
From the rebellious teens of the 90s and 00s we bring you the stars who said "To hell with the world" and expressed themselves through great tunes!
Alex serves up 30 of the greatest, darkest, skinny jeans-iest, heavy eye makeup-iest & back-combed hair-iest anthems from the worlds most glorious miserable genre!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
From 2003 to 2015 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Muse!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
25 of the greatest rock bands of the noughties featuring Paramore, Bullet For My Valentine, Slipknot and My Chemical Romance.
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring Paramore, Imagine Dragons, Linkin Park, Evanescence & The Arctic Monkeys. This is Now Rock!
Starting in the 00s, bow before the royal rock stage! Home to the best front men and leading ladies that the world of rock has produced!
Turn your amp up to 11 & make your mic roar! Here come 25 of the greatest 00s rock karaoke tracks. Featuring The Killers, Fall Out Boy, Arctic Monkeys & many more!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
An hour of Anthems and the biggest rock songs from 90s rock legends Bon Jovi!

programmes.show_name: Axe Attack - The Best Guitar Riffs
programmes.show_description: From Motorhead to AC/DC, Guns N Roses to Aerosmith, we start at 1970 and bring you the best guitar riffs through the years that you are desperate to learn!
From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!
Nicky Horne presents his favourite songs behind 30 of the greatest rock album covers ever! Featuring The Beatles & Queen, The Stones & Pink Floyd.
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
Over 3.5 hours of the biggest rock bands of the noughties! Featuring acts like Papa Roach, My Chemical Romance & Razorlight, through to Slipknot, Paramore & Bullet For My Valentine
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
These are power ladies who really rock! From Avril Lavigne and Pink to Amy Lee and Hayley Williams.
T'Pau's Carol Decker with 30 years of the most amazing women who ROCK! From Grace Slick in the 60s to Florence Welch in the 00s - these ladies all left an incredible mark.
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
35 years of raucous rock operas with over-the-top videos to match. Kicking off with the biggest drama of all - Bohemian Rhapsody - and with plenty of Meat Loaf along the way!
